title: Blitzy Agent Session Observability
description: Dashboard template describing log queries, metric panels, and trace views for monitoring a Blitzy Agent CLI session.

log_queries.name: Per-session correlation
log_queries.description: Group log records by correlation_id to follow a single session end-to-end.

log_queries.name: Error rate by provider
log_queries.description: Count error-level records partitioned by the active provider for the session.

log_queries.name: API key mask violation counter
log_queries.description: Sentinel query that should always return zero — alerts if a sensitive value bypasses the KEY_MASK_FILTER.
log_queries.query: msg:~"sk-" OR msg:~"BLITZY_API_KEY=" OR msg:~"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=" OR msg:~"MISTRAL_API_KEY="

metric_panels.name: P99 LLM latency by provider
metric_panels.description: Histogram of llm.complete span durations. Uses the 'span.' namespace prefix emitted by vibe/core/observability.py:_record_histogram (f'span.{name}.duration_ms').

health_summary.description: Readiness check exposed by vibe/core/observability.py:is_ready() — returns True after backend __aenter__ completes successfully.
